# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 650

A “trolley coach” is a vehicle which is propelled by electric power obtained from overhead trolley wires, but not operated upon rails.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: A “trolley coach” is a vehicle which is propelled by electric power obtained from overhead trolley wires, but not operated upon rails.
